name: claude-code-for-raycast
title: Claude Fleet
description: See and resume your Claude Code agents, and review PRs — from Raycast.
author: vmc-7645

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal
preferences.description: Where agents open. Focus Tab / Nudge / Close Tab need Ghostty (per-tab accessibility); other terminals still get Resume/Fork/Review/Spawn/etc.

preferences.name: primaryClick
preferences.title: Agent primary action
preferences.description: What Enter does on a live agent in the Agents list.

preferences.name: editorCommand
preferences.title: Editor command
preferences.description: CLI command to open a folder in your editor (e.g. code, cursor). Must be on PATH.

preferences.name: reposRoot
preferences.title: Repos directory
preferences.description: Override where repos are discovered. Blank = use ~/.config/claude-fleet/repos.env or ~/Repos.

preferences.name: quickReplies
preferences.title: Quick replies
preferences.description: Comma-separated canned follow-ups for the Quick Reply action on a live agent (Ghostty only).
preferences.default: Continue, Run the tests, Looks good — commit

preferences.name: tabOpenMode
preferences.title: Open agents as
preferences.description: Ghostty only. Tab: reuse a window already hosting the same project (else the frontmost window), opening a new tab. Window: always open a fresh Ghostty window.

preferences.name: tabOpenDelay
preferences.title: Tab open delay (s)
preferences.description: Ghostty only. Seconds to wait after opening a tab/window before the command is pasted in. Default 0.3 is tuned for the paste path; raise it only if an agent occasionally opens in the right folder but doesn't start.

preferences.name: stuckMinutes
preferences.title: Stalled agent threshold (min)
preferences.description: Flag an agent that's still "working" but hasn't updated in this many minutes as possibly stuck/hung in the Agents list. Raise it if long builds trip it.

commands.name: agents
commands.title: Agents
commands.subtitle: Claude Fleet
commands.description: See active and recent Claude agents; resume, fork, or jump to them.

commands.name: next-agent
commands.title: Next Waiting Agent
commands.subtitle: Claude Fleet
commands.description: Focus the agent that's been waiting on you longest. Assign a hotkey; off by default.

commands.name: my-prs
commands.title: My PRs
commands.subtitle: Claude Fleet
commands.description: Your open PRs across repos; review any of them in Claude.

commands.name: review-requests
commands.title: PRs to Review
commands.subtitle: Claude Fleet
commands.description: Open PRs awaiting your review; hand any to claude /review.

commands.name: spawn
commands.title: Spawn Agent
commands.subtitle: Claude Fleet
commands.description: Spawn a Claude agent in a fresh worktree from a task.

commands.name: review-pr
commands.title: Review PR
commands.subtitle: Claude Fleet
commands.description: Open Claude to review a PR in a chosen repo.

commands.name: my-issues
commands.title: My Issues
commands.subtitle: Claude Fleet
commands.description: Your open issues across repos; start an agent on one.

commands.name: worktrees
commands.title: Worktrees
commands.subtitle: Claude Fleet
commands.description: List git worktrees across your repos; open, resume, or remove.

commands.name: mcp
commands.title: MCP Servers
commands.subtitle: Claude Fleet
commands.description: List MCP servers + auth status; re-authenticate.

commands.name: claude-config
commands.title: Claude Code Config
commands.subtitle: Claude Fleet
commands.description: Edit settings/CLAUDE.md, view hooks/plugins, set model, doctor, version.

commands.name: new-session
commands.title: New Session
commands.subtitle: Claude Fleet
commands.description: Start a fresh Claude session in a repo (no worktree).

commands.name: fleet-menu-bar
commands.title: Fleet
commands.subtitle: Claude Fleet
commands.description: Menu-bar indicator of Claude agents needing you.
